title: Evaluation of large language models for diagnostic impression generation from brain MRI report findings: a multicenter benchmark and reader study
authors_text: Ming-Liang Wang*, Rui-Peng Zhang*, Wen-Juan Wu, Yu Lu, Xiao-Er Wei, Zheng Sun, Bao-Hui Guan, Jun-Jie Zhang, Xue Wu, Lei Zhang, Tian-Le Wang, Yue-Hua Li.
